creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250312
py-junos-eznc-2.7.0.patch

Hi,

attached is a patch that updates net-mgmt/py-junos-eznc to 2.7.0.

Note:

py-junos-eznc 2.7.0 also requires a newer version of net-mgmt/py-ncclient which should be resolved via bug #278678.


There is already version 2.7.1 of py-junos-eznc, which I deliberately didn't choose because it pulls in a custom patched module of py-paramiko 3.4.0 during build/installation.

QA:
- poudriere -> OK (13.2-RELEASE amd64 for py38 - py311)
